# Cobra

> Cobra is a library for creating powerful modern CLI applications.

## Guide

- [Overview](/readme.html): Cobra is a library for creating powerful modern CLI applications.
- [User Guide](/site/content/user-guide.html): While you are welcome to provide your own organization, typically a Cobra-based application will follow the following organizational structure:
- [site/content/projects-using-cobra](/site/content/projects-using-cobra.html): Projects using Cobra Allero Arewefastyet Arduino CLI Azion Bleve Cilium CloudQuery CockroachDB Conduit Constellation Cosmos SDK Datree Delv…
- [Active Help](/site/content/active-help.html): Active Help is a framework provided by Cobra which allows a program to define messages (hints, warnings, etc) that will be printed during program usage. It aims to make it easier for your users to learn how to use your program. If configured by the program, Active Help is printed when the user triggers shell completion.
- [Generating shell completions](/site/content/completions/): Cobra can generate shell completions for multiple shells. The currently supported shells are:
- [Generating Bash Completions For Your cobra.Command](/site/content/completions/bash.html): Please refer to Shell Completions for details.
- [site/content/completions/zsh](/site/content/completions/zsh.html): Please refer to Shell Completions for details.
- [site/content/completions/fish](/site/content/completions/fish.html): Please refer to Shell Completions for details.
- [Generating PowerShell Completions For Your Own cobra.Command](/site/content/completions/powershell.html): Please refer to Shell Completions for details.
- [Documentation generation](/site/content/docgen/): You may set `cmd.DisableAutoGenTag = true` to _entirely_ remove the auto generated string "Auto generated by spf13/cobra..." from any documentation source.
- [Generating Markdown Docs For Your Own cobra.Command](/site/content/docgen/md.html): Generating Markdown pages from a cobra command is incredibly easy. An example is as follows:
- [Generating ReStructured Text Docs For Your Own cobra.Command](/site/content/docgen/rest.html): Generating ReST pages from a cobra command is incredibly easy. An example is as follows:
- [Generating Yaml Docs For Your Own cobra.Command](/site/content/docgen/yaml.html): Generating yaml files from a cobra command is incredibly easy. An example is as follows:
- [Generating Man Pages For Your Own cobra.Command](/site/content/docgen/man.html): Generating man pages from a cobra command is incredibly easy. An example is as follows:
